_publications._publicationTitle: Merlin/NF2 loss-driven tumorigenesis linked to CRL4(DCAF1)-mediated inhibition of the hippo pathway kinases Lats1 and 2 in the nucleus.

_contextSnippet: silencing of Lats1/2 rescued the ability of DCAF1-depleted Schwannoma cells to form tumors to a very large extent
details: Silencing of Lats1/2 rescued the ability of DCAF1-depleted FC-1801 schwannoma cells to form tumors to a very large extent
